name: browser-use-agent
description: Runs the upstream Browser Use Agent in the embedded OnMyAgent browser with the selected desktop model.

displayDescription.en: Plans and executes multi-step browser tasks in OnMyAgent's embedded browser.
displayDescription.zh: 在 OnMyAgent 内置浏览器中规划并执行多步骤浏览器任务。

quickPrompts.en: Open a website and summarize its visible content.
quickPrompts.zh: 打开一个网站并总结页面可见内容。

quickPrompts.en: Complete this browser workflow and keep the final tab open.
quickPrompts.zh: 完成这个浏览器流程，并保留最终标签页。
